title: Uber’s product chief on hotels, robotaxis, and why the company doesn’t want t...

Webpages can now expose client-side JavaScript tools and forms to browser-based AI models, creating a seamless bridge between static web content and active agentic execution.

PrestaShop Remark: Leverage WebMCP-ready modules to prepare your cart actions for automated AI crawler buyers.
